question: Will anyone get a perfect score at ARML 2026?
reason: Historical data shows few perfect individual scores in ARML competitions.
evidence: In 2025, Christopher Qiu achieved a perfect individual score in the ARML competition.
In 2024, Shruti Arun and Rohith Thomas from Colorado achieved perfect individual scores.
In 2021, Srinivas Arun from Colorado achieved a perfect individual score.
In 2020, only one student achieved a perfect individual score in the ARML competition.
In 2019, no student achieved a perfect individual score in the ARML competition.
raw: {"yes_probability": 0.05, "confidence": "medium", "short_reason": "Historical data shows few perfect individual scores in ARML competitions.", "key_evidence": ["In 2025, Christopher Qiu achieved a perfect individual score in the ARML competition.", "In 2024, Shruti Arun and Rohith Thomas from Colorado achieved perfect individual scores.", "In 2021, Srinivas Arun from Colorado achieved a perfect individual score.", "In 2020, only one student achieved a perfect individual score in the ARML competition.", "In 2019, no student achieved a perfect individual score in the ARML competition."], "source_urls": ["https://admissionsight.com/arml/", "https://www.coloradomath.org/news.html", "https://www.coloradomath.org/arml.html"]}
